scenes.description: Continuation of the performance of 'Paradise Lost'.
Stage transition and intro for the next song. Omaru Polka speaks briefly.
Performance of 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' with members of Hololive and HoloX.

subtitles.original: 離さない
subtitles.english: I won't let go

subtitles.original: 見つめて Paradise Lost
subtitles.english: Stare at Paradise Lost

subtitles.original: やっとみんな会えたね！
subtitles.english: Finally we all met!

subtitles.original: Nonstop No-stop The Finish!
subtitles.english: Nonstop No-stop The Finish!

subtitles.original: GIRLS' LEGEND U
subtitles.english: GIRLS' LEGEND U

subtitles.original: Nonstop No-stop The Finish!
subtitles.english: Nonstop No-stop The Finish!

subtitles.original: だって全力走りたい
subtitles.english: Because I want to run at full speed

subtitles.original: 芝と砂と君の追い切りメニュー
subtitles.english: Turf, dirt, and your final training menu

subtitles.original: 頼む頼む 声出せ叫べ
subtitles.english: Please, please, raise your voice and shout

subtitles.original: Whoa-oh-oh-oh
subtitles.english: Whoa-oh-oh-oh

subtitles.original: それぜ！ Fight! Oh! Fight! Oh!
subtitles.english: That's it! Fight! Oh! Fight! Oh!

subtitles.original: だって全力上がりたい
subtitles.english: Because I want to rise at full speed

subtitles.original: 譲れない夢の途中
subtitles.english: In the middle of an unyielding dream

subtitles.original: 始めよう ここから最高ストーリー
subtitles.english: Let's begin, from here the best story

subtitles.original: Whoa-oh-oh-oh...
subtitles.english: Whoa-oh-oh-oh...

subtitles.original: あぁ 憧れに満ちて
subtitles.english: Ah, filled with longing

subtitles.original: 語り合ったメモリー
subtitles.english: Memories we talked about

subtitles.original: もっとドキドキ もっとトキメキ
subtitles.english: More pounding heart, more excitement

subtitles.original: 抑えられない たまんない
subtitles.english: Can't hold it back, it's unbearable

subtitles.original: 熱いハラハラが止まらない
subtitles.english: The hot suspense won't stop

subtitles.original: 君と 走り競いゴール目指し
subtitles.english: With you, racing and aiming for the goal

subtitles.original: はるか響け届けミュージック
subtitles.english: Let the music resonate and reach far away

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっとずっと想い
subtitles.english: Always, always, always, always, these feelings

subtitles.original: 夢はきっと叶うなら
subtitles.english: If the dream will surely come true

subtitles.original: あの日君に感じた 何かを信じて
subtitles.english: Believing in something I felt for you that day

subtitles.original: 春も夏も秋も冬も 越え願い焦がれ走れ
subtitles.english: Crossing through spring, summer, autumn, winter, wishing, longing, and running

subtitles.original: 勝利へ！
subtitles.english: To victory!

subtitles.original: Nonstop No-stop The Finish!
subtitles.english: Nonstop No-stop The Finish!

subtitles.original: Nonstop No-stop The Finish!
subtitles.english: Nonstop No-stop The Finish!

subtitles.original: だって全力弾けたい
subtitles.english: Because I want to burst at full speed

subtitles.original: 大団円 決意 絆になった
subtitles.english: The grand finale, determination, it became a bond

subtitles.original: 万丈 万丈 本気で叫べ
subtitles.english: Banjou, banjou, shout in earnest

subtitles.original: Whoa-oh-oh-oh
subtitles.english: Whoa-oh-oh-oh

subtitles.original: それぜ！ Fight! Oh! Fight! Oh!
subtitles.english: That's it! Fight! Oh! Fight! Oh!

subtitles.original: だって全力笑いたい
subtitles.english: Because I want to laugh at full speed

subtitles.original: 最高峰 真ん中
subtitles.english: Top peak, right in the center

subtitles.original: リアルに ここから上昇ストーリー
subtitles.english: Realistically, from here the rising story

subtitles.original: Whoa-oh-oh-oh...
subtitles.english: Whoa-oh-oh-oh...

subtitles.original: あぁ 駆け抜けた日々
subtitles.english: Ah, days we ran through

subtitles.original: 語り合ったグローリー
subtitles.english: Glory we talked about

subtitles.original: 今応えたい 生きてると
subtitles.english: I want to answer now, that I'm alive

subtitles.original: 背中を押す声 熱くなれ
subtitles.english: The voice pushing my back, become hot

subtitles.original: 夢は夢のまま 終われない
subtitles.english: A dream can't end as just a dream

subtitles.original: 君と 未来描きゴール目指し
subtitles.english: With you, drawing the future and aiming for the goal

subtitles.original: 狙い定め掴めウイニング
subtitles.english: Set your aim and grab the winning

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっとずっと想い
subtitles.english: Always, always, always, always, these feelings

subtitles.original: 夢はきっと叶うから
subtitles.english: Because the dream will surely come true

subtitles.original: あの日君が鳴らした 涙も信じて
subtitles.english: Believing even in the tears you shed that day

subtitles.original: 雨も風も雲も闇も 越え願い焦がれ走れ
subtitles.english: Crossing through rain, wind, clouds, and darkness, wishing, longing, and running

subtitles.original: 勝利へ！
subtitles.english: To victory!

subtitles.original: 揺るぎない覚悟決して
subtitles.english: Never wavering resolve

subtitles.original: 一つ二つ共に綴る記録
subtitles.english: One, two, records we write together

subtitles.original: 背中に迫る迷い振り払え
subtitles.english: Shake off the hesitation closing in behind you

subtitles.original: 今の自分追い越すだけ
subtitles.english: Just overtaking my current self

subtitles.original: 勝ちたい 勝ちたい 勝ちたい 君と勝ちたい！
subtitles.english: I want to win, I want to win, I want to win, I want to win with you!

subtitles.original: 未来描きゴール目指し
subtitles.english: Drawing the future and aiming for the goal

subtitles.english: Because the dream will surely come true

subtitles.original: あの日君が鳴らした 涙も信じて
subtitles.english: Believing even in the tears you shed that day

subtitles.original: 春も夏も秋も冬も 越え 雨も風も越え
subtitles.english: Crossing through spring, summer, autumn, winter, and rain and wind

subtitles.original: 雲も闇も越え 勝利へ！
subtitles.english: Crossing through clouds and darkness, to victory!

subtitles.english: With you
